sources.title: Night Of The Scorpion 1972
sources.description: A young widower with his new wife returns to the mansion in which his first wife died under strange and unexplained circumstances.

metadata.Plot: Oliver and Ruth are a young couple who just got married, Oliver is a widower. They decide to move into an old mansion belonging to his family in which under bizarre circumstances, his first wife mysteriously died from unexplained circumstances. Once inside the place, they are greeted by his sister as well as his stepmother. Oliver though is still haunted by the inexplicable death of his first wife, and soon Ruth begins to suspect that it was perhaps not an accident to what caused her demise.
metadata.Writer: Alfonso Balcázar, Giovanni Simonelli, José Ramón Larraz
metadata.Actors: José Antonio Amor, Daniela Giordano, Nuria Torray
